PAGE_TITLE: Drupal Comments, Live Chat & Collaboration Module | FastComments
META_DESCRIPTION: Add live comments, live chat, and collaboration to your Drupal site with FastComments. Widget blocks for Drupal 10 and 11, entity field integration, and granular permissions. Free trial.
HEAD_KEYWORDS: drupal comments, drupal commenting system, drupal live chat, drupal comment module, fastcomments drupal, drupal sso comments, drupal discussion, drupal collaboration, drupal 10 comments, drupal 11 comments
HERO_TITLE: Comments, Live Chat & Collaboration for Drupal
HERO_DESCRIPTION: Six widget blocks for threaded comments, real-time chat, collaboration, and more. Native entity field integration, granular Drupal permissions, and Secure SSO via your existing user accounts.
WIDGET_SECTION_SUBTITLE: Each block is available in Structure > Block Layout. Place them in any region, configure per content type.
WIDGET_1_DESCRIPTION: Full-featured threaded comments with replies, @mentions, voting, rich text, and real-time updates.
WIDGET_1_CODE:
Structure > Block Layout >
  FastComments Comment Widget
WIDGET_2_DESCRIPTION: Real-time chat rooms for live events, support, or community hubs with online presence indicators.
WIDGET_2_CODE:
Structure > Block Layout >
  FastComments Live Chat
WIDGET_3_DESCRIPTION: Inline collaboration chat for document review, editorial workflows, and team discussions.
WIDGET_3_CODE:
Structure > Block Layout >
  FastComments Collab Chat
WIDGET_4_DESCRIPTION: Pin conversations directly on images. Ideal for design review, photo annotations, and visual feedback.
WIDGET_4_CODE:
Structure > Block Layout >
  FastComments Image Chat
WIDGET_5_DESCRIPTION: Display a feed of the latest comments across your site. Great for sidebars and activity dashboards.
WIDGET_5_CODE:
Structure > Block Layout >
  FastComments Recent Comments
WIDGET_6_DESCRIPTION: Show your most-discussed pages ranked by comment count. Drive traffic to popular content.
WIDGET_6_CODE:
Structure > Block Layout >
  FastComments Top Pages
ENTITY_SECTION_SUBTITLE: Add FastComments as a field on any content type. Comments are automatically tied to each entity.
ENTITY_FEATURE_1: Add as a field to Article, Page, or any custom content type
ENTITY_FEATURE_3: Configure display in Manage Display settings
ENTITY_FEATURE_4: Works with Views and Layout Builder
ENTITY_CODE:
Structure > Content types > Article
  > Manage fields > Add field
  > FastComments

Manage display >
  Drag FastComments field
  to your desired region
SPIDER_SUBTITLE: FastComments brings a full suite of features to your Drupal site.
SSO_SUBTITLE: Choose the authentication mode that fits your Drupal site's needs.
SSO_SECURE_DESCRIPTION: Server-side HMAC token verification via Drupal's user system for maximum security.
SSO_SIMPLE_DESCRIPTION: Client-side SSO for quick setup without server configuration.
SSO_NONE_DESCRIPTION: Let users create their own FastComments accounts independently.
PERMISSIONS_SUBTITLE: Control who can configure, view, and manage FastComments through Drupal's built-in permissions system.
PERMISSIONS_ADMIN_DESCRIPTION: Full access to module configuration, API keys, and global settings. Typically assigned to administrators.
PERMISSIONS_ADMIN_FEATURE_1: Configure API key and tenant ID
PERMISSIONS_VIEW_DESCRIPTION: Allows users to see FastComments widgets on content pages. Assign to authenticated or anonymous roles.
PERMISSIONS_TOGGLE_DESCRIPTION: Enable or disable FastComments per content item. Useful for editors who manage specific pages.
HOW_IT_WORKS_SUBTITLE: Four steps to live comments on your Drupal site.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_1_DESCRIPTION: Run composer require drupal/fastcomments or install via the Drupal admin UI.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_2_DESCRIPTION: Navigate to /admin/config/content/fastcomments and enter your FastComments API key and tenant ID.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_3_DESCRIPTION: Add a FastComments field to your content type or place a widget block in any region via Block Layout.
HOW_IT_WORKS_STEP_4_DESCRIPTION: Clear caches with drush cr and your visitors will see live, real-time comments immediately.
FAQ_DRUPAL_FREE_TRIAL_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments offers a 30-day free trial with full access to all features, including SSO, live chat, and collaboration tools. No credit card required to start.
FAQ_DRUPAL_SSO: How does SSO work with Drupal users?
FAQ_DRUPAL_SSO_ANSWER: When Secure SSO is enabled, the module reads the authenticated Drupal user and generates an HMAC-signed token on the server side. This creates or updates the user's FastComments account automatically with their name, email, and avatar. Users are signed in seamlessly without any extra registration.
FAQ_DRUPAL_VERSIONS_ANSWER: The FastComments Drupal module supports Drupal 10 and 11. It requires PHP 8.1 or higher and follows Drupal's standard module architecture.
FAQ_DRUPAL_GDPR_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments is fully GDPR compliant with an optional EU-based CDN that keeps all data within Europe. We support data export requests, right-to-deletion, and provide a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) on request.
FAQ_DRUPAL_PERMISSIONS_ANSWER: The module integrates with Drupal's built-in permissions system. You can control who can administer FastComments settings, view comment widgets, and toggle comments on specific content items through People > Permissions.
FAQ_DRUPAL_MULTILINGUAL_ANSWER: Yes. FastComments supports 14+ languages out of the box and automatically detects the user's locale. It works seamlessly with Drupal's multilingual system including Content Translation and Interface Translation modules.
FINAL_CTA_TITLE: Ready to Add Comments to Your Drupal Site?
FINAL_CTA_DESCRIPTION: Install the module, add a field or block, and go live in minutes.
